story_format.i_want: Clear separation of concerns between the DevinWrapper (thin CLI adapter) and the Orchestrator (instrumentation and state management)
story_format.so_that: The codebase is maintainable, testable, and can support multiple agent types in the future

target_persona.permissions: Can modify orchestrator, wrapper, and saga execution logic
target_persona.context: Responsible for maintaining the saga execution framework and ensuring clean architecture patterns

capability_breakdown.core_action: Refactor DevinWrapper to be a thin CLI adapter and move instrumentation logic to Orchestrator
outputs_expected: Generic AgentWrapper interface for future extensibility
state_changes: Session ID management moves to Orchestrator
Logging and output redirection moves to Orchestrator
Verification script invocation moves to Orchestrator
side_effects: Existing saga execution tests may need updates

acceptance_criteria.criteria: DevinWrapper accepts prompt, agent_config, optional timeout, and optional session_id
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a prompt and agent configuration, When DevinWrapper.execute_prompt is called, Then it returns (output, session_id) tuple
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Execute prompt with agent CLI tool

acceptance_criteria.criteria: DevinWrapper does not manage session files, logging, or verification scripts
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given DevinWrapper execution, When the wrapper completes, Then no session files or logs are written by the wrapper

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Orchestrator loads step definition data and enriches prompts before calling wrapper
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step_id, When orchestrator.invoke_step is called, Then the orchestrator loads step data and enriches the prompt
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Enrich prompt with context before execution

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Orchestrator manages session lifecycle (session_id.txt, feedback.txt, stderr.txt)
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given wrapper execution, When orchestrator receives output, Then orchestrator writes session state files

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Orchestrator invokes verification scripts after step execution
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given step execution completion, When orchestrator processes results, Then orchestrator invokes the step's verification script

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Generic AgentWrapper interface enables future agent implementations
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a new agent type, When implementing AgentWrapper interface, Then the new agent can be used without modifying orchestrator

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Timeout enforcement happens at orchestrator level, not wrapper level
acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a timeout parameter, When orchestrator calls wrapper, Then orchestrator enforces the timeout around the wrapper call
